series_metadata.series_title: Personal Service Subpoenas and Liquor Commission Orders
series_metadata.series_description: To document when personal service subpoenas and Liquor Commission orders are received, sent, or processed for service by Ohio Investigative Unit agents. Documented on cover sheet of orders.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Document will be scanned into database and original can be shredded. ; Electronic: Document will be scanned into database. electronic record permanently
